attributes.additional_details:
No one should have to suffer in silence or fight to be believed. It's time to take these conditions seriously and provide the care and attention they deserve.

Especially when we are getting told it's in our heads, it can take years to get diagnosed! It can take years, months just to get seen.

We shouldn’t have to suffer on a daily basis, having a condition like this interferes with our daily activities.
attributes.background:
These conditions aren't spoken about enough!
These conditions deserve recognition, respect, and proper medical support.
Many are dismissed, misdiagnosed.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do.

You may wish to sign the following petitions:

Fund improvement to PCOS, Endometriosis, and Fertility Health care and treatment
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757794

Set a maximum 6‑month diagnosis target for endometriosis
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756697

Significantly increase dedicated funding for endometriosis
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/766449

Review endometriosis treatment options and communication of these to patients
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763242
